meaning: 1. subject; 2. branch of learning; 3. course; 4. academic discipline
sentence: 数学是所有理工学科的基础。
pinyin: Shù xué shì suǒ yǒu lǐ gōng xué kē de jī chǔ.
english: Mathematics is the foundation of all STEM disciplines.

meaning: 1. medicine; 2. medical science; 3. study of medicine
sentence: 他从小就想学医学，长大后真的考上了医学院。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù xiǎng xué yīxué, zhǎngdà hòu zhēn de kǎoshàng le yīxuéyuàn.
english: He wanted to study medicine since he was little, and he really did get into medical school when he grew up.

sentence: 他们在教堂里举行了婚礼。
pinyin: Tāmen zài jiàotáng lǐ jǔxíng le hūnlǐ.
english: They held their wedding ceremony in the church.

meaning: another one is ...; the other thing is ...
sentence: 要带的东西有雨伞，再就是充电宝。
pinyin: Yào dài de dōng xī yǒu yǔ sǎn, zài jiù shì chōng diàn bǎo.
english: Things to bring include an umbrella, and also a power bank.

sentence: 这项运动男女都可以参加。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng yùndòng nánnǚ dōu kěyǐ cānjiā.
english: Both men and women can participate in this sport.
